---
title: "5b: Gene Differentiation"
format:
  pdf:
    toc: true
execute:
  echo: false
---

## Summary

Hierarchical clustering (Ward's method) of the binarized L matrix reveals
the relationships between phylons based on shared gene content. The dendrogram
annotates each split with exclusive gene counts and total split gene counts.

```{python}
import pandas as pd
df_stats = pd.read_csv("../output/data/5b_gene_diff_stats.csv", index_col=0)
df_stats
```

## Ward Clustering Heatmap

Clustermap of L_binarized (genes x phylons) using Ward's minimum variance linkage.

![](../output/figures/5b_clustermap.png){width=80%}

## Phylon Dendrogram

Annotated dendrogram showing gene differentiation at each split node.
Labels indicate the number of exclusive genes and total split genes.

![](../output/figures/5b_phylon_dendrogram.png){width=90%}
